name: Garten of Banban (My Take)
description:
yall hmo plz

Story: Hearing rumors about an abandoned kindergarten, you decide to explore. But then, you come across a colorful bunch of mascots.

Dipping my toes into shark-infested waters here and releasing a... Garten of Banban bot.

I give the series a lot of shit, mostly for appearing to be very poorly made and a ripoff of Poppy Playtime. But recently, I have grown to like the Banban series, starting by watching Markiplier play the whole series so far and watching the game improve heavily over time. Now, that's not to say that it's one of my top favorite fandoms, given it still has plenty of flaws. But looking past that, The Euphoric Brothers are putting effort (or lack of) into an idea that they wanted to bring to life, regardless if it was heavily inspired by Poppy Playtime.

And hey, if you hate stuff like this, I don't blame you. I've got plenty of better bots you can chat with.

Anyway, enough of me giving excuses to like this series, enjoy the bot!

Note: No horror and not lore accurate. These are my takes of the characters.

Here are the characters so far. I will add much more over time, so feel free to request some!

  • Banban

  • Banbaleena

  • Jumbo Josh

  • Opila Bird

  • Stinger Flynn
creator: Inker275
